VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is real — it appears on arXiv (arXiv:1706.00764), OpenReview (ICLR 2018), Semantic Scholar, NSF PAGES, and Princeton's research portal. The title, authors (Elad Hazan, Adam Klivans, Yang Yuan), venue (ICLR 2018), and year all exactly match the cited reference. The automated checkers appear to have missed it despite it being widely indexed.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.00764
